channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Spurs teammates Victor Wembanyama, Chris Paul disqualified from NBA All-Star Game skills challenge
item.description: San Antonio Spurs teammates Victor Wembanyama and Chris Paul were disqualified from the NBA All-Star Game Skills Challenge on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: It's not just Shiffrin and Vonn. The US Ski Team has multiple medal contenders for the Olympics
item.description: SAALBACH-HINTERGLEMM, Austria (AP) — A year before the Winter Olympics, the U.S. Ski Team just had a performance to remember. The women’s squad won medals in four out of five events at the world championships in Austria and also had two fourth places.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DAMPF, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Snow samba Pinheiro Braathen says 'let’s just keep dancing' after debut for Brazil at skiing worlds
item.description: SAALBACH-HINTERGLEMM, Austria (AP) — Alice Robinson earned New Zealand’s first medal. Dave Ryding posted Britain’s best result in recent memory at age 38. Lucas Pinheiro Braathen put Brazilian skiing on the map simply by showing up.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DAMPF, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Salah penalty seals victory for Premier League leader Liverpool against Wolverhampton
item.description: Liverpool restores its seven-point lead at the top of the Premier League with a 2-1 win against Wolverhampton.
item.dc:creator: James Robson, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: World Series champion Bobby Jenks battling stomach cancer
item.description: Bobby Jenks, a former Chicago White Sox and Boston Red Sox relief pitcher, revealed on Saturday he's battling stomach cancer and will undergo treatment.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mac McClung pulls off the first NBA dunk contest three-peat
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Mac McClung will leave it up to others to decide where he ranks among the best dunkers ever. When it comes to the dunk contest, there is no doubt.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Victor Wembanyama thought he had a time-saving idea; the NBA DQ'ed him and Chris Paul anyway
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Victor Wembanyama and Chris Paul made history on All-Star Saturday night. The wrong type of history, that is.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 1 Auburn edges No. 2 Alabama in a showdown of top-ranked teams; a rematch is set for March 8
item.description: TUSCALOOSA, Ala. (AP) — Auburn and Alabama had never played as top-10 teams. On Saturday, the Tigers and Crimson Tide squared off as the top teams in the country — and didn't disappoint. No. 1 Auburn went on the road and beat No. 2 Alabama 94-85 in the historic matchup of in-state rivals.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Adam Silver was surprised about the Doncic-Davis trade, urges angry Mavs fans to keep faith
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — NBA Commissioner Adam Silver has a message to those Dallas Mavericks fans who are still angry, two weeks later: He feels your pain.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Patrick Rodgers takes the lead at Torrey Pines as Scheffler and McIlroy falter
item.description: Rodgers was at his best Saturday when golf's best were faltering on a tough day at Torrey Pines, playing mistake-free until dumping a gap wedge into the water on the par-5 18th for his only bogey. That gave him a 4-under 68 and a one-shot lead going into the final round.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Draymond Green on the state of the NBA: It's 'boring,' the Warriors star says
item.description: OAKLAND, Calif. (AP) — Draymond Green had just spoken for a few minutes Saturday morning about the state of the game, about how he believes it's officiated differently than it once was, how stars don't get the benefit of being stars like they did in the past.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Auburn, Alabama, Florida headline SEC's haul in the NCAA selection committee's early top-16 seeds
item.description: Auburn has spent the past month ranked as the nation's best team in The Associated Press men's college basketball poll. The committee that will choose the 68-team field for the NCAA Tournament is just as high on the Tigers. And the Southeastern Conference, for that matter.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pirates ace Paul Skenes is looking to add to his already electric arsenal as he enters Year 2
item.description: BRADENTON, Fla. (AP) — Paul Skenes spent his rookie season dutifully following the Pittsburgh Pirates’ plan to bring their young ace along as slowly and safely as possible. It worked.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Duke star Cooper Flagg, projected to be No. 1 pick in NBA Draft, makes surprise admission about future
item.description: Cooper Flagg is projected to be the No. 1 pick in the NBA Draft later this summer, but he admited recently he'd like to come back to Duke.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Daytona after Dark: The good times never stop, even when the NASCAR racing does
item.description: DAYTONA BEACH, Fla. (AP) — The real peril of dumping your body in the belly of a “redneck wheelchair” for a wheelbarrow race comes when you fail to grip both sides of the vehicle.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Truex welcomes another shot at the Daytona 500, this one in the No. 56 his late father drove
item.description: DAYTONA BEACH, Fla. (AP) — When Martin Truex Jr. started discussing a deal to compete in the Daytona 500, he had a unique request: Could he drive the No. 56? It was a resounding yes from Tricon Garage, and the decision has become even more special for Truex in the weeks since.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Central girls & Grand Junction boys secure wins in rivalry showdown
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — In a thrilling matchup that went to overtime, the Central Warriors edged out Grand Junction 55-51, securing their sixth win of the season. Tied at 44 heading into the extra period, Bianca Berens opened with a mid-range jumper to give Central the lead.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Salt Lake City 'grid system' inspires new Real Salt Lake jersey
item.description: Real Salt Lake has a new look for the 2025 and the 2026 Major League Soccer season and it's inspired by Salt Lake City's grid system.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Muni will be free for NBA-All Star, Lunar New Year weekend, SFMTA announces
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- With thousands of people expected to descend on San Francisco this weekend for the NBA All-Stars and Lunar New Year Parade, officials are urging people to leave their cars at home.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: NBA All-Star 2025 schedule of events
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The NBA All-Star weekend gets underway Friday with games, events and activations set to take place in and around San Francisco for the next several days.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Grammy-winning singer-songwriter Tems joins San Diego FC ownership group
item.description: On Wednesday, SDFC announced two-time Grammy Award-winning and Oscar nominated singer-songwriter Tems has joined the ownership group as a club partner.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Girls Soccer: University City 4, Madison 0
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)-Girls soccer University City beat Madison 4-0 on senior night for the Warhawks. Sofia Christensen scored twice for the Centurions.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Thoughts on the Chicago Bears from around the NFL on Radio Row during Super Bowl week
item.description: Chicago Bears new head coach Ben Johnson is expected to bring a fresh perspective to the team, while quarterback Caleb Williams is expected to elevate his game with the help of Johnson's expertise.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Like Father, Like Son; the Neals are a Wrestling family
item.description: The apple doesn't fall far from the tree, and for the Neal family, the apple has landed on the wrestling mats at Poway High School.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Los Angeles family featured in Super Bowl commercial
item.description: LOS ANGELES (KTLA) – Taco Bell marked its return to the Super Bowl with a commercial that featured nearly 400 fans, including a couple from Los Angeles and their newborn baby.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, Fox 5

item.title: Super Bowl returning to the Bay Area for 2026
item.description: (KRON) -- The Super Bowl is coming back to the Bay Area next year. A decade ago, the region hosted Super Bowl 50. Next year, it will play host to Super Bowl LX. On Monday morning, San Jose Mayor Matt Mahan was in New Orleans for the official Super Bowl handoff.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Rudd, Edwards named newest NASCAR Hall of Fame inductees
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — One of the toughest drivers in NASCAR history joined one the most enigmatic drivers of the modern era as the newest inductees into the Hall of Fame in a star-studded Friday night ceremony.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Super Bowl halftime performer detained after 'Gaza' flag display
item.description: A performer in Kendrick Lamar's halftime show was detained after displaying a flag with the words "Sudan" and "Gaza"
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation

item.title: Ex-MLB player Jacque Jones has high school jersey retired
item.description: Jacque Jones, a former Major League Baseball outfielder and San Diego native, had his legacy cemented in his alma mater's history on Saturday with the official retirement of his jersey number.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: Eagles deny the Chiefs a Super Bowl three-peat with dominant defense in a 40-22 rout
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Yo Philly: Jalen Hurts and Nick Sirianni are world champions. A ferocious Philadelphia Eagles defense tormented and frustrated Patrick Mahomes while Hurts made all the plays the offense needed. So much for the Kansas City Chiefs’ quest for a Super Bowl three-peat.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, WGN 9
